speaker: speaker1
text: Thanks for inviting me to work out with you , Joan .

speaker: speaker2
text: Don't mention it , let's go in .

speaker: speaker1
text: Yeah , this place looks great . Wow , look at her , she can certainly get down , can't she ?

speaker: speaker2
text: She sure can . Are you jealous , Leslie ?

speaker: speaker1
text: A little , I wish I could do that .

speaker: speaker2
text: You can ! With a little practice .

speaker: speaker1
text: How do they all get in such tiptop shape ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Exercised over and over . Exercise is a key .

speaker: speaker1
text: That's it . I decided to turn over a new leaf . I'm going to exercise every single day .
